def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rolling_high = df['high'].rolling(window=params['window']).max()
    rolling_low = df['low'].rolling(window=params['window']).min()
    mid_point = (rolling_high + rolling_low) / 2
    signals = np.where(df['close'] > rolling_high, 1, np.where(df['close'] < rolling_low, -1, 0))
    signals = np.where((df['close'] > mid_point) & (df['close'] < rolling_high), 1, signals)
    signals = np.where((df['close'] < mid_point) & (df['close'] > rolling_low), -1, signals)
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits strong support/resistance levels, with price action near these levels indicating potential reversals or continuations.
